steps.title: Use the example of portraits
steps.content: The text says Hayes has characteristic works that include esteemed portraits of notable figures. That context points to being known for painting such portraits.

steps.title: Reject illogical phrases
steps.content: Choice A would suggest dissatisfaction with portrait painting. Choice B would suggest uncertainty about it. Choice C would suggest an obligation. None fits the idea that the portraits are characteristic and esteemed. The answer is D.
